full_text:
Experimental Plan

Experiment: Dissociation protocol optimization S481_pAdnR

Objective: Optimize the dissociation protocol to isolate more fibroblasts from ovarian tumors.

Approaches:

1. *Using trypsin and collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

1 hour C&H

2. *Using dispase followed by collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

30 min dispase + 1 hour C&H

Experimental Steps:

1. *Sample Preparation*:

Collected ovarian tumor samples

Mince the tumor piece into small pieces using sterile scalpel and scissors, and divided the minced tissue into two equal parts.

2. *Dissociation Protocols*:

*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions*:

Treated sample with C&H for 1 hour at +37°C rotating. Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions: 70 µm cell strainer

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transfer the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, wash the stainer with 5 ml media, and discard the leftover tissue pieces.

Centrifuge the cell suspension 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C

RBC lysis: 4 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 20 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 2 ml of DMEM/F12 media and made a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry, and freezing.

*Dispase followed by collagenase conditions*:

Treated sample with dispase for 30 minutes (at +37°C rotating). Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

dispase dissociation media: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filter the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions. Keep the tissue leftovers.

For cell suspension (dispase only):

RBC lysis: 4 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 20 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 2 ml of DMEM/F12 media and made a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry, long-term organoid establishment, and freezing.

Further, the leftover tissue was dissociated with C&H for 1 h at +37°C rotating. Vortexed before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media 4.45 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 500 µl C&H (10x stock) + 50 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples to obtain single-cell suspensions

RBC lysis: 3 ml, incubated 5 min RT, added 15 ml cold DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged

Resuspended in 2 ml of DMEM/F12 media and made a 1:10 dilution for counting. Counted the cells and prepared the aliquots for flow cytometry, and freezing.

Made 1.5 E6 cell aliquots for flow cytometry:

from dispase + C&H, 3x multicolor, 8 x FMO, 1 x unstained

from dispase only, 1x multicolor

from C&H only, 1x multicolor

Froze 3 cryovials with 5 E6 cells each from all three conditions (dispase, C&H and dispase + C&H)

For the rest of the dispase + C&H dissociated cells, did fibroblast purification/enrichment. From that got 2 samples for flow cytometry; fibroblasts and flow though.

Cell counts:

Dispase

cell count 1)

total: 5.03 E6 cells/ml

live: 1.39 E6 cells/ml

viability: 27.7 %

size: 7.4 µm

cell count 2)

total: 2.74 E6 cells/ml

live: 1.91 E6 cells/ml

viability: 69.8 %

size: 10.1 µm

on average 3.885 E6 x 10 cells/ml = 38.85 cells/ml, 48.75 % viability

38.85 E6 cells/ml in 2 ml, so the total cell count is 77.7 E6 cells

C&H

cell count 1)

total: 6.01 E6 cells/ml

live: 1.69 E6 cells/ml

viability: 28.1 %

size: 8.0 µm

cell count 2)

total: 5.49 E6 cells/ml

live: 2.09 E6 cells/ml

viability: 38.0 %

size: 7.8 µm

on average 5.75 E6 x 10 cells/ml = 57.5 E6 cells/ml, 33.05 % viability

57.5 E6 cells/ml in 2 ml, so the total cell count is 115 E6 cells

dispase + C&H

cell count 1)

total: 3.84 E6 cells/ml

live: 1.22 E6 cells/ml

viability: 31.9 %

size: 8.3 µm

cell count 2)

total: 3.74 E6 cells/ml

live: 1.57 E6 cells/ml

viability: 41.8 %

size: 8.2 µm

on average 3.76 E6 x 10 cells/ml = 37.6 E6 cells/ml, 36.85 % viability

37.6 E6 cells/ml in 2 ml, so the total cell count is 75.2 E6 cells

3. *Fibroblast enrichment*:

Rest of dispase + C&H dissociated cells was used for fibroblast enrichment. The total cell count was 42.2 E6 cells before starting the protocol.

Anti-fibroblast MicroBeads protocol by Miltenyi Biotec was used as guidance.

Used the previously prepared MACS buffer, but re- sterile-filtered before using it.

MACS buffer, cells, and beads were kept on ice when not needed inside the hood.

Cells were centrifuged at 300 g for 5 min RT and the cell pellet was resuspended in 80 µl of cold MACS buffer (Commercial protocol suggests 80 µl per 10 E7 cells. To the suspension, 20 µl of Anti-Fibroblast MicroBeads was added (protocol: 20 µl per 10 E7 cells) Cell suspension was mixed well and incubated 30 min at RT. Cells were washed by adding 1 ml MACS buffer and centrifuged 300 g for 10 min. The supernatant was aspirated and cells were resuspended in 500 µl of MACS buffer.

LS column and 30 µm filter were placed in the magnetic MACS Separator. Column and filter were prepared by washing it with 3 ml MACS buffer. The cell suspension was added to the column and washed with 3 x 3 ml MACS buffer. Collected the flow-through to a 15 ml falcon tube which should include all cells except fibroblasts. The column was removed from the separator and placed on a new 15 ml falcon tube. 5 ml MACS buffer was added to the column and with firmly pushing the plunger into the column, magnetically labeled cells flushed out. Both cell suspensions were centrifuged 300 g for 10 min, and resuspended in 500 µl of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

Fibroblasts

cell count 1)

total: 3.52 E6 cells/ml

live: 2.29 E6 cells/ml

viability: 65.2 %

size: 10 µm

cell count 2)

total: 4.50 E6 cells/ml

live: 2.98 E6 cells/ml

viability: 66.3 %

size: 10.2 µm

on average 4.01 E6 cells/ml, 65.75 % viability

in total 4.01 cells in 1 ml

Flow-though

cell count 1)

total: 7.28 E6 cells/ml

live: 5.77 E6 cells/ml

viability: 79.3 %

size: 9.0 µm

cell count 2)

total: 6.63 E6 cells/ml

live: 5.36 E6 cells/ml

viability: 80.7 %

size: 9.2 µm

on average 6.955 E6 cells/ml, 80 % viability

in total 6.955 E6 cells/ml x 2 ml = 13.91 E6 cells

For flow cytometry, 1,5 E6 cell aliquots were made from each sample.

Rest was discarded as the enrichment was done in non-sterile conditions.

4. *Flow Cytometry*:

Multicolor samples:

Only dispase

Only collagenase & hyaluronidase

Dispase + collagenase & hyaluronidase x3

Fibroblasts (dispase + C&H)

Flow-through (dispase + C&H)

Unstained sample: dispase + C&H

FMO samples (dispase + C&H)

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM (CD326) FMO

a-SMA FMO

CD29 FMO

CD31 FMO

PDGFR-β FMO

FAP FMO

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6min 400 g at +4°C).

For multicolor samples, diluted the antibodies in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon), added 50 µl of the antibody mix to cells, and incubated 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

For FMO samples, added the needed amount Brilliant Stain buffer (see table above) to the cells and then added antibodies one by one. Incubated 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and incubated 5 min at +4°C.

Centrifuged, washed the pellet with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

Next day, centrifuged, diluted intracellular antibody in Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended pellet into 50 µl antibody mix. Incubate 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

Washed once with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and resuspended in 400 µl FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Used BD CompBeads Plus (7.5 µm) compensation beads.

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-9006274) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-9006227) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, added 2 µl of each antibody.

the same antibodies as in FC panel except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM.

for aSMA, 2.5 µl instead of 2 µl

Incubated approx. 1 hour min at +4°C shielded from light and resuspended to 350 µl FACS buffer.
